Interesting merger arbitrage: ACME Corp acquisition by BigCo

March 15, 2026

ACME Corp (ticker: ACME) announced a definitive agreement to be acquired by BigCo for $45.00 per share in cash.

Current share price is $42.50, spread approximately 5.9%. Expected close Q3 2026. Break fee 3.5% of deal value.

Expected return: 5.9% absolute, ~12% annualized assuming Q3 close.

Key risks: FTC review, financing condition.

Disclosure: Long ACME
